title: Convert DragN's Livestock Overhaul Horses to SWEM Horses
description: A lightweight datapack that automatically replaces DragN's Livestock Overhau horses with SWEM horses — no command blocks required. Runs every tick to ensure full immersion when using the Star Worm Equestrian Mod (SWEM).
body:
📦 Description
This (unofficial) really small, simple and lightweight datapack automatically replaces DragN's Livestock Overhaul horses with SWEM (Star Worm Equestrian) horses for any world or server — completely in the background and without any need for command blocks. 

It runs every tick and uses an optimized execute command to detect DragN's Livestock Overhaul horses and summon their SWEM equivalent at the same position.

🧠 Designed for modded servers or singleplayer worlds using the Star Worm Equestrian Mod (SWEM), where you want to fully transition from DragN's Livestock Overhaul to SWEM's horses.

No commands... No setup... 
Just horses that work the way you'd expect in a SWEM-based world.

![How it works](https://i.postimg.cc/T3PBkDKd/Film-bez-tytu-u-Wykonano-za-pomoc-Clipchamp-3.gif)


🛠️ Compatibility
- ✅ Tested with Minecraft 1.20.1 (requires SWEM mod).
- ⚠️ Should be compatible with 1.18.2 (same datapack structure - but not guaranteed & not tested).

If you encounter any issues or want to suggest improvements — just let me know (kindly, please!) and leave a comment [(on CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/convert-dragns-livestock-overhaul-horses-to-swem/comments)!

_**(video from vanilla horses datapack but it works the same)**_

🔧 How to Install
1. Download the .zip file.
2. Drop it into your world's /datapacks/ folder.
3. Start your world or server.
4. Run /reload (if needed).
5. Done!

💡 Honestly — this is something the original mod should have done from the beginning. Or at the very least offered as a simple config toggle (true/false). But for some unknown reason, it wasn’t included. Why? I don't know... So this datapack steps in to do exactly what SWEM overlooked: a smooth, automatic replacement of DragN's Livestock Overhaul horses with SWEM horses.

✨ Feel free to use this datapack in your own world, server, modpack
Just enjoy it and ride off into the blocky sunset. 🐎🌅

Also on CurseForge
[[https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/convert-dragns-livestock-overhaul-horses-to-swem](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/convert-dragns-livestock-overhaul-horses-to-swem)]([https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/convert-dragns-livestock-overhaul-horses-to-swem](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/convert-dragns-livestock-overhaul-horses-to-swem

PS.

You can do it also by using Repeating Command Block
<details>
<summary>> Command used <</summary>
execute as @e[type=horse] at @s store success entity @s[y=-64,dy=320] Pos[1] double -2112 run summon swem:swem_horse
</details>

Thx for idea and base command to GalSergey from Reddit.com
[https://www.reddit.com/r/MinecraftCommands/comments/12j48um/comment/jx87o3i/](https://www.reddit.com/r/MinecraftCommands/comments/12j48um/comment/jx87o3i/)
